seo.title: Building RAG Pipeline with Mastra + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build rag pipeline with Mastra + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building a RAG Pipeline with Mastra enables scalable document retrieval, vector search, and LLM synthesis for accurate knowledge-grounded responses. However, common pitfalls like unvalidated workflow outputs, malformed tool responses, and stale memory retrieval can lead to hallucinations and unreliable answers. Vex provides essential guardrails as middleware to verify source faithfulness, context relevance, and citation accuracy in high-risk deployments.

architectureOverview.heading: RAG Pipeline Architecture with Mastra
architectureOverview.description:
The Mastra RAG pipeline starts with a user query triggering a workflow that performs vector search over a knowledge base to retrieve relevant document chunks. These chunks are assembled into context, augmented with metadata for attribution, and passed to an LLM for synthesis. Mastra's agentic workflows handle transitions between retrieval, ranking, and generation steps, with memory stores persisting conversation history.

Vex integrates as middleware at key transition points: post-retrieval validation, pre-LLM context checks, and post-generation verification. This ensures retrieved sources are relevant, context is fresh, and final outputs include accurate citations without hallucinations.

The architecture leverages Mastra's `WorkflowNode` and `Agent` primitives, with Vex `Guardrail` wrappers around tool calls and LLM prompts for continuous monitoring.

risks.name: Workflow step outputs not validated between transitions
risks.description: Mastra workflows pass unverified retrieval results directly to LLM, risking irrelevant context propagation
risks.mitigation: Vex middleware validates retrieval scores and chunk relevance before context assembly

risks.name: Agent tool calls returning malformed data
risks.description: Vector search tools return inconsistent embeddings or broken metadata, breaking citation chains
risks.mitigation: Vex schemas enforce structured tool outputs with source metadata validation

risks.name: Memory retrieval injecting stale context
risks.description: Mastra memory stores outdated document versions, causing factual drift in multi-turn conversations
risks.mitigation: Vex freshness checks against knowledge base timestamps before context injection

risks.name: Sync integration data causing agent confusion
risks.description: Third-party doc syncs introduce format changes that confuse retrieval and attribution logic
risks.mitigation: Vex monitors integration health and flags schema drift in real-time

cta.heading: Secure Your Mastra RAG Pipeline
cta.description: Add Vex middleware today to achieve production-grade reliability for your Mastra RAG workflows.
